untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (EPS growth YoY, P/E ratio, market share runway, market saturation assessment) that are NOT available in the technical indicator list. These are qualitative/fundamental inputs, not price/volume/technical indicators. Specifically missing: YoY EPS growth %, current P/E ratio, qualitative TAM expansion assessment, and market saturation analysis.
translation_notes: The rule is fundamentally based on earnings growth (>15% YoY), valuation multiples (P/E <20), and qualitative market potential assessment—all requiring fundamental data and manual qualitative judgment. Only the price-based condition (5-20% of 200-day MA) could be partially translated to technical indicators, but this alone does not capture the signal's core logic. A proper implementation requires a fundamental data source and decision framework outside this technical backtester.
